record.TEST: Check for AdvSIMD and FP support
Check for PMU and PMU counters
Check num of Breakpoints and type
Check Stage2 and Stage1 Granule match
Mem Access Response in finite time
PE must access all NS addr space
If PCIe, GICv3 then ITS, LPI
Check NS EL2-Virt timer PPI Assignment
Check NS EL2-Phy timer PPI Assignment
Check GICv2m SPI allocated to MSI Ctrl
Check MSI SPI are Edge Triggered
Check GICv2m MSI to SPI Generation
Check number of ITS blocks in a group
Check ITS block association with group
MSI-capable device linked to ITS group
MSI-cap device can target any ITS blk
MSI to ITS Blk outside assigned group
MSI-X triggers intr with unique ID
Check Device IDs not behind SMMU
All SMMUs have same Arch Revision
Check SMMU Large Physical Addr Support
SMMUv2 unique intr per ctxt bank
SYS Timer if PE Timer not ON
Generate Mem Mapped SYS Timer Intr
Restore PE timer on PE wake up
Wake from EL1 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 VIR Timer Int
Wake from EL2 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 VIR Timer Int
Wake from EL2 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 VIR Timer Int
Wake from EL2 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 VIR Timer Int
Wake from EL2 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 VIR Timer Int
Wake from EL2 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 VIR Timer Int
Wake from EL2 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 VIR Timer Int
Wake from EL2 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 VIR Timer Int
Wake from EL2 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 PHY Timer Int
Wake from EL1 VIR Timer Int
Wake from EL2 PHY Timer Int
Check UART type Arm Generic or 16550
Check all RP in HB is in same ECAM
All EP/Sw under RP in same ECAM Region
Check RP Sec Bus transaction are TYPE0
Check Config Txn for RP in HB
Check all 1's for out of range
Check Cmd Reg memory space enable
Vendor specific data is PCIe compliant
PCIe & PE common physical memory view
Check MSI support for PCIe dev
MSI(-X) triggers intr with unique ID
PCI legacy intr SPI ID unique
Check Legacy Intr SPI level sensitive
RP must suprt ACS if P2P Txn are allow
Memory Attribute of I/O coherent DMA
